name: R-16 (SS-93)
events: 2 Mar 1942 USS R-16 departed Bermuda for St. Thomas, Virgin Islands.
7 Mar 1942 USS R-16 arrived at St. Thomas, Virgin Islands from Bermuda.
2 Dec 1942 USS R-16 departed St. Thomas, Virgin Islands for Trinidad.
16 Feb 1943 USS R-16 departed Trinidad for Bermuda.
23 Feb 1943 USS R-16 arrived at Bermuda from Trinidad.
25 Feb 1943 USS R-16 departed Bermuda for New London, Connecticut.
1 Mar 1943 USS R-16 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Bermuda.
27 Jul 1943 USS R-16 departed New London, Connecticut for Bermuda.
4 Jul 1945 USS R-16 departed New London, Connecticut for the Philadelphia Navy Yard for decommissioning.
5 Jul 1945 USS R-16 arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for decommissioning.
